report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v4: Publish queue fully emptied — 2 final learn guides promoted (stablecoin-payments, omnichain-defi). 609 published slugs (+18 uncommitted), 1,240 pages on disk stable. 147 TS errors flat. 20 uncommitted files (mostly new reports/social assets from automated cycles). No regressions.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,240 page.tsx files on disk — STABLE from v3. No new pages scaffolded or deleted this cycle.

609 published slugs in working tree (+18 from v3's 591 committed count). 2 new pages promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE: /learn/stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026, /learn/omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026.

103 published slugs still missing page.tsx — UNCHANGED. Persistent gaps in: /compare/exchanges, 19 /learn/ guides, 8 /taxes/ pages, 18 /wallets/ pages, 13 /investing/best/ pages, 9 /blog/ posts, 3 misc.
147 TypeScript errors — STABLE across all cycles today. All non-blocking (learn page JSX + structured-data.examples.ts). No new regressions.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP 200 responses on degen0x.com from sandbox. Code-level audit shows no new build-breaking patterns.
PUBLISH_QUEUE is now EMPTY. All queued pages have been promoted. Two slug-mismatched pages remain flagged for manual fix (wallet-security, restaking).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present with proper caching: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), trending (300s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL), defi-yields (dynamic TTL).
No code changes to any API route this cycle. All caching layers and fallback patterns unchanged.
Fallback coverage: 5/6 routes have stale-cache or static fallback. defi-yields still lacks stale fallback — minor gap, unchanged from v3.
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key). 4/6 core routes depend on CoinGecko. Rate limit risk persists on cold-cache bursts.
Supporting routes healthy in code: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe, og, admin.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live API latency, data freshness, or upstream API health (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me) from sandbox.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 5dad971 (Apr 1) — 'feat: admin page manager, learn guides, metadata fixes'. Same HEAD as v3, no new commits this cycle.
Working tree now 20 uncommitted files (up from 8 in v3). Growth from automated report/social card generation: 5 modified tracked files + 15 untracked (reports, SVGs, community drafts).
Key uncommitted tracked changes: published-pages.ts (2 pages promoted, queue emptied), notifications-feed.json, publish report JSON, 2 skill binary files.
DEPLOY NOTE: If Vercel auto-deploys from git push, these uncommitted changes (including the 2 newly published pages) won't be live until committed and pushed.
Production build expected to succeed — TS errors remain non-blocking. No new build-breaking patterns in code.
No Vercel dashboard access from sandbox — cannot confirm deployment status, error spikes, or build duration.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: THIS CYCLE: Publish queue fully emptied — 2 remaining learn guides promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Automated reports and social card assets generated.
DELTA FROM v3: Published slugs 591→609 (uncommitted), uncommitted files 8→20 (report/social growth), pages on disk stable at 1,240, TS errors flat at 147.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs (needs scaffolding). P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback. P4 — 20 uncommitted files need commit+push to deploy.
RESOLVED THIS CYCLE: Publish queue emptied (was 2 items). All promotable pages have been published.

NEEDS JEFE ATTENTION: 20 uncommitted files including published-pages.ts changes. Needs commit + push to trigger Vercel deploy and make the 2 new pages indexable. Also: 2 slug-mismatched pages need manual fix (wallet-security, restaking).
